StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(cn.name) AS movie_company, MIN(mi_idx.info) AS rating, MIN(t.title) AS drama_horror_movie FROM job.company_name AS cn, job.company_type AS ct, job.info_type AS it1, job.info_type AS it2, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_info_idx AS mi_idx, job.title AS t WHERE cn.country_code = '[us]' AND ct.kind = 'production companies' AND it1.info = 'genres' AND it2.info = 'rating' AND mi.info IN ('Drama', 'Horror') AND mi_idx.info > '8.0' AND t.production_year BETWEEN 2005 AND 2008 AND t.id = mi.movie_id AND t.id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.info_type_id = it1.id AND mi_idx.info_type_id = it2.id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND ct.id = mc.company_type_id AND cn.id = mc.company_id AND mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id AND mi.movie_id = mi_idx.movie_id
